title: Embracing Artificial Intelligence For PR Efficiency
description: Embracing Artificial Intelligence for PR efficiency at the 8th edition of the Lagos Digital PR Summit, with theme: “Reinventing Public Relations Proficiencies With Artificial Intelligence”, organized
html: Embracing Artificial Intelligence for PR efficiency at the 8th edition of the Lagos Digital PR Summit, with theme: “Reinventing Public Relations Proficiencies With Artificial Intelligence”, organized by the Nigerian Institute of Public Relations (NIPR), Lagos state chapter.
